## Source: amazon-inspector (77d8076c0caa289734b5a30b904f9a075ae0d55ea3fc74f665806d913efe7d28)
The package paychex-common-vendor-lib was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (56ec286ed47dfe01871f3459bbf2c85defe54c4dd04034a318781c95304b0591)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'paychex-common-vendor-lib' @ 100.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
